sourceMovie.title: Wonder Woman 1984
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Wonder Woman 1984 (2020) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wonder Woman 1984 clicked for you, Wonder Woman (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Justice League Dark
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wonder Woman 1984 clicked for you, Justice League Dark (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Crisis on Two Earths
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wonder Woman 1984 clicked for you, Justice League: Crisis on Two Earths (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Wonder Woman 1984?
faq.answer: Try Wonder Woman, Justice League Dark, Justice League: Crisis on Two Earths—each shares DNA with Wonder Woman 1984 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Wonder Woman 1984?
faq.answer: Wonder Woman 1984 (2020) is best described as Action, Adventure, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Wonder Woman 1984 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Wonder Woman Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
